title: Determination of Small Amounts of Praseodymium(lll) and Neodymium(IIl) with 1-(2-Pyridylazo)-naphthol-2 in Aquo-ethanol Medium
author: S. C. LAVALE
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Post Grad sate Chemistry Department, Govt. College, Betul-460 001 

 Department of Chemistry, University of Saugar, Sagar-470 003 
 Manuscript received 17 September 1982, revised 19 June 1984, accepted 8 November 1984  

 1-(2-Pyridylazo)-naphthol-2 has been successfully used as an amperometric reagent for the precise determination of small amounts of Pr III  and Nd III . The lower detection limit is 0.10 mg in 10 ml of the test solution of metal ion, titrations have been performed at —0.6 V  vs  S.C.E.,  µ = 0.4 (NH 4 OH -NH 4 Cl buffer) in 80% ethanol medium. Titration are not in any way hampered by presence of various cations and anions.
